theme_and_archetype.rationale: App is a Deepfake Image & Video Detector ('TruePixel') requiring a futuristic, command-center aesthetic. We avoid pure blacks/whites to prevent eye strain, using deep void black with glassmorphism and targeted neon.

surface_strategies.tracing_beam: relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:-z-10 before:rounded-[inherit] before:p-[1px] before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-cyan-500/50 before:via-purple-500/50 before:to-transparent

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Dashboard uses 'Control Room' dense grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous internal padding for cards: p-6 or p-8.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen glassmorphism panel border-r border-white/10

components_and_interactions.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized: rounded-lg font-mono font-medium tracking-wide transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)] hover:bg-cyan-500/20
components_and_interactions.cards: Floating floating hover: -translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300, glassmorphism surface.

animations.floating: framer-motion: y: [-5, 5, -5] with repeat: Infinity, duration: 4, ease: 'easeInOut'
animations.page_transition: framer-motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
animations.parallax_hover: Hover tilt with 3D perspective (rotateX, rotateY) on floating cards

pages.login: Centered floating glass card. Animated background particles (using tsparticles or framer-motion floating divs). Google Social Login button with glowing focus states. Subtle 3D depth layering.
pages.dashboard: Sidebar with navigation (Home, Upload, History, Settings). Main panel with floating 3D cards. Prominent Upload section with drag & drop and glowing border. Detection result panel showing confidence score and a Real vs Fake animated indicator (e.g., circular progress bar that turns red/green). Session history section with grid of thumbnails.

media_and_assets.logo_instructions: Use lucide-react 'ScanFace' or 'Aperture' icon in cyber cyan (#00F0FF) paired with 'TruePixel' text in Outfit font.

image_urls.description: Abstract glowing purple/green network for Login Page background
Abstract purple lines for alternative areas
Glitch art face representing a deepfake detection
Another glitch art face for fake detection history
Normal portrait for real detection history
Profile picture of the logged-in user

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='upload-dropzone', data-testid='analyze-button', data-testid='confidence-score'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use #05050A for the main background to reduce eye strain and give a premium feel.
Implement the Login Page as a full-screen layout with a centered Glassmorphism card, using the provided background image with a dark overlay (bg-black/60).
Implement the Dashboard using a sidebar and main content area. Make sure grid items use col-span based on the 'Control Room' grid layout.
The 'Upload Zone' must have a dashed glowing border and drag-and-drop interactive hover states.
Use framer-motion for the Real vs Fake indicator. A glowing progress bar or circular ring that animates from 0 to the confidence score.
Ensure all fonts are imported via next/font or Google Fonts (Outfit for headings, JetBrains Mono for body).
Session history should just be a React state array with the mock thumbnail images provided.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and major containers.
